messages.content:
Summarize the CVE description in professional cybersecurity language.

Delta Electronics CNCSoft-B Versions 1.0.0.2 and prior has a null pointer dereference issue while processing project files, which may allow an attacker to execute arbitrary code.

Delta Electronics CNCSoft-B versions 1.0.0.2 and earlier are susceptible to a null pointer dereference vulnerability when processing project files. This flaw could be exploited by an attacker to execute arbitrary code.
